message:
refactor(cli): centralize ID resolution into resolve_issue_id(s) helpers, optimize storage queries

Extract and centralize ID resolution logic to eliminate repeated
boilerplate across all CLI subcommands:

Core (mod.rs):
- resolve_issue_id() now takes (storage, resolver, input) instead of
  (storage, resolver, all_ids, input) — uses storage.id_exists() and
  storage.find_ids_by_hash() directly instead of searching an in-memory vec
- New resolve_issue_ids() bulk variant wrapping resolver.resolve_all_fallible()

Subcommands (close, defer, reopen, update, comments, create, dep,
graph, label, ready):
- Remove per-command storage.get_all_ids() calls and the all_ids vec
- Replace manual resolver.resolve_all() with centralized helpers
- Simplify loop variables from ResolvedId destructuring to &String

Storage (sqlite.rs):
- Existence checks use SELECT 1 ... LIMIT 1 instead of SELECT id
- External ref collision check gets LIMIT 1
- Dependency existence check: SELECT 1 ... LIMIT 1 with is_empty()
- update_issue() short-circuits empty-update case before fetching

agents.rs: minor formatting fix on LazyLock expect() call

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
